name: Ivano-Frankivsk Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the Carpathian sky and Galician heritage
the wreath and details — wealth, sun, the historic Galician arms

description: A blue field charged with the coat of arms of Ivano-Frankivsk Oblast, featuring the historic Galician jackdaw (kavka) and supporting elements.
history: Adopted as the regional flag of Ivano-Frankivsk Oblast, historically part of the Kingdom of Galicia and a centre of Hutsul and Boyko culture.

features.symbolism: Galician heraldic heritage of the region
